zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Sherburne於1456年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾利波爾 瓦利時，她的父親Sir Robert Sherburne22歲，母親Joan Radcliffe27歲。她於1460年8月27日與Sir Thomas Fairfax在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年3月31日在英國越可爾吉爾林享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾 韋斯特 利丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Sherburne于1456年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾利波爾 瓦利时，她的父亲Sir Robert Sherburne22岁，母亲Joan Radcliffe27岁。她于1460年8月27日与Sir Thomas Fairfax在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年3月31日在英国越可爾吉爾林享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾 韋斯特 利丁。

nameMeanings.name: Sherburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of several places called with Old English scīr ‘bright, clear’ + burna ‘stream’, including Sherburn in Elmet (Yorkshire), Sherburn (East Yorkshire, Durham), Shirburn (Oxfordshire), Sherborne (Dorset, Gloucestershire), Sherborne Saint John, Monk Sherborne (Hampshire), Sherbourne (Warwickshire), Sherbourne in Albury (Surrey), and Sherborne in Litton (Somerset). This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sherbon
meanings: English: variant of Sherburne with loss of the second -r- by dissimilation. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Sherburne was born in 1456, in Ribble Valley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Sherburne, was 22 and her mother, Joan Radcliffe, was 27. She married Sir Thomas Fairfax on 27 August 1460, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 31 March 1505, in Gilling, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Yorkshire West Riding, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Sherburne est née en 1456, à Ribble Valley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Sherburne, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Radcliffe, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Fairfax le 27 août 1460, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 mars 1505, à Gilling, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Yorkshire West Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Sherburne 1456 in Ribble Valley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Sherburne 22 und ihre Mutter Joan Radcliffe 27. Sie hat am 27. August 1460 in Yorkshire, England Sir Thomas Fairfax geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. März 1505 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Gilling, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Yorkshire West Riding, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sherburneが1456年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアリブル ヴァリーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Sherburneは22歳，母Joan Radcliffeは27歳であった。1460年8月27日にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir Thomas Fairfaxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1505年3月31日にイギリスヨークシュアイアギリングで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア ウエスト リディングにて埋葬された。

ko.Gilling East, North Yorkshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 길링 이스트
ko.Gilling East, Ryedale District, North Yo: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 길링 이스트
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sherburne(이)가 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리브블일 발리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Sherburne(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Radcliffe(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1460년 8월 27일 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir Thomas Fairfax(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 3월 31일 영국 요르크실르 길링에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨스트 리딩에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Fairfax em 27 de agosto de 1460, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.Gilling East, Ryedale District, North Yo: джиллинг эаст, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Sherburne родилась в 1456 г. в местности риббл валли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Sherburne было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Radcliffe, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Fairfax 27 августа 1460 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 31 марта 1505 г. в местности джиллинг, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности еркшир вест ридинг, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Ribble Valley, Lancashire, England, Unit: Ribble Valley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Sherburne nació en 1456, en Ribble Valley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Sherburne, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan Radcliffe, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Fairfax el 27 de agosto de 1460, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 31 de marzo de 1505, en Gilling, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Yorkshire West Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
